MINI MINUTES:
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D.Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Bay Property Group is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff, with settlement authority.
Defendant Rafael Navarro is present.
Attorney Rita E. Tautkus representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
